recommendations.title: The 33
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of the collapse of a mine in San Jose, Chile—that left 33 miners isolated underground for 69 days.

recommendations.title: Under the Same Moon
recommendations.overview: Tells the parallel stories of nine-year-old Carlitos and his mother, Rosario. In the hopes of providing a better life for her son, Rosario works illegally in the U.S. while her mother cares for Carlitos back in Mexico.

recommendations.title: Girl in Progress
recommendations.overview: As single mom Grace juggles work, bills, and her affair with a married doctor, her daughter, Ansiedad, plots a shortcut to adulthood after finding inspiration in the coming-of-age stories she's reading for school.

recommendations.title: G20
recommendations.overview: After the G20 Summit is overtaken by terrorists, President Danielle Sutton must bring all her statecraft and military experience to defend her family and her fellow leaders.

recommendations.title: Miracles from Heaven
recommendations.overview: When Christy discovers her 10-year-old daughter Anna has a rare, incurable disease, she becomes a ferocious advocate for her daughter’s healing as she searches for a solution. After Anna has a freak accident and falls three stories, a miracle unfolds

recommendations.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
recommendations.overview: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, 1991. High school freshman Charlie is a wallflower, always watching life from the sidelines, until two senior students, Sam and her stepbrother Patrick, become his mentors, helping him discover the joys of friendship, music

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: A Charlie Brown Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Charlie Brown complains about the overwhelming materialism that he sees amongst everyone during the Christmas season, Lucy suggests that he become director of the school Christmas pageant. Charlie Brown accepts, but it is a frustrating struggle.
